topic: The HR manager who finally stopped processing leave requests on WhatsApp — what changed in week one
format: Before/after of a single workflow: same task, two completely different experiences
post:
11 leave requests over WhatsApp before 9am on a Monday. That was one HR manager's week, every single week, at a mid-size company in Muscat — before SmartPro Hub.

Week one looked different.

Leave requests went through the employee portal. Auto-routed to the right approver. Status visible without anyone having to chase it down. Zero follow-up messages.

She didn't process a single leave request on WhatsApp that week.

Not because people stopped taking leave. Because there was finally a proper place to do it.

This is what SmartPro Hub customers running HR software in Oman describe consistently: week one isn't some dramatic overhaul. It's just the small, grinding chaos that stops. Approval chains that actually reach the right person. Records that live somewhere other than a manager's phone.

We built this because a group chat held together by one exhausted person is not a workflow. GCC operations deserve better than that.

SmartPro Hub covers HR, WPS payroll Oman compliance, work permits, SPF filings — all in one place, bilingual Arabic and English. Starter plans from OMR 12/month.

What in your business is still running on WhatsApp when it shouldn't be?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
